options.label: A
options.text: A planet that orbits the Sun

options.label: B
options.text: A natural satellite that orbits the Earth

options.label: C
options.text: A star that produces its own light

options.label: D
options.text: A comet made of ice and rock

explanation: The Moon is Earth's natural satellite. It is a rocky body that orbits Earth and is held in orbit by Earth's gravity. Unlike stars, the Moon does not produce its own light but reflects light from the Sun.
